name: @ironflyer/theia-branding
description: Ironflyer branding extension for Theia: custom color themes, brand fonts, title/About cleanup, and de-cluttered shell.
//type-comment: Theia extensions are CommonJS; do not set "type": "module".

scripts.//build-comment: gen re-derives the CSS vars + dark/light themes from packages/design-tokens/brand.ts (single source of truth, shared with the MUI theme) before tsc. In the standalone Docker build brand.ts is absent and gen no-ops, using the committed generated files.

//contributes-comment: Theia (>=1.x, like VS Code) discovers color themes for an internal extension via the standard package.json contributes.themes block. This is the cleanest, most idiomatic approach for 1.60 — no programmatic ColorContribution needed for full themes. The referenced JSON files use the VS Code color-theme schema (colors + tokenColors).
